name: operator-enrichment-r
description: Built-in atomic operator plugin: real ORA and GSEA enrichment via clusterProfiler and fgsea in the shared analysis environment.

interface.longDescription: Provides one atomic functional enrichment operator for query gene lists or ranked gene tables and GMT/two-column TSV gene sets. ORA is computed with clusterProfiler::enricher and ranked GSEA is computed with fgsea in the shared Omiga analysis environment; missing packages fail explicitly instead of falling back to fake results.
defaultPrompt: Expose the functional enrichment plugin and run it on my ranked or significant gene list.
